title: dianthus pinifolius subsp. tenuicaulis
intro: Dianthus pinifolius subsp. tenuicaulis, also known as the pine-leaved pink or narrow-stemmed pink clover, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as a diuretic. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, due to its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Dianthus pinifolius subsp. tenuicaulis include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be used to alleviate various health concerns.
